title: Naik Taksi
opening: Selamat datang, mau ke mana tujuan kita hari ini?

t1.prompt: Selamat datang, mau ke mana tujuan kita hari ini?
t1.promptTranslation: Selamat datang (Suh-lah-mat dah-tang) — Welcome, where are we headed today?

t2.prompt: Baik, ke sana. Lalu lintas lumayan padat sekarang. Mau lewat tol atau jalan biasa?
t2.promptTranslation: Baik (Ba-ik) — Okay, to there. Traffic is quite heavy now. Do you want to take the toll road or the regular road?

t3.prompt: Oke, lewat [ROUTE]. Mungkin sekitar 30-40 menit tergantung kemacetan, dengan perkiraan ongkos Rp50.000. Ada barang bawaan yang perlu ditaruh di bagasi?
t3.promptTranslation: Oke (Oh-keh) — Okay, via [ROUTE]. It might take around 30-40 minutes depending on traffic, with an estimated fare of Rp50,000. Do you have any luggage that needs to be put in the trunk?

t4.prompt: Siap, barangnya bisa ditaruh di bagasi. Untuk pembayaran, Bapak/Ibu prefer tunai atau non-tunai lewat aplikasi/kartu?
t4.promptTranslation: Siap (See-ahp) — Understood, your items can be put in the trunk. For payment, Sir/Ma'am, do you prefer cash or cashless via app/card?

t-repeat.prompt: Maaf, bisa diulang? Saya kurang jelas.
t-repeat.promptTranslation: Maaf (Mah-ahf) — Sorry, could you repeat that? I didn't quite catch it.

t-end.prompt: Baik, mari kita berangkat. Selamat menikmati perjalanan Anda!
t-end.promptTranslation: Baik (Ba-ik) — Alright, let's go. Enjoy your trip!
